summary: PR #2495 improves `src/melee/lb/lbsnap.c` matching by replacing placeholder-style code and signatures, extracting small helpers for repeated text clearing, tiled image offsets, and save-data offset calculation, and reducing several lbsnap functions to 100% according to the PR body and bot report. The PR was closed with no merge timestamp in the provided metadata.

key_files.role: Main decomp/matching changes: helper extraction, control-flow reshaping, signature/local cleanup, tiled RGB conversion offset cleanup, save-data offset helper, and reduced PAD_STACK usage in touched lbsnap functions.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/lb/lbsnap.c added 84 deleted 92 hunks 7

raw_diff: lbsnap.c hunks for lbSnap_ClearText, lbSnap_GetTiledRGBOffset, lbSnap_GetTiledYOff, lbSnap_GetSaveDataOffset, lbSnap_8001D5FC, lbSnap_8001D7B0, lbSnap_8001DA5C, lbSnap_8001DC0C, lbSnap_8001DF20, lbSnap_8001DF6C, lbSnap_8001E058
human_pr_text: improves src/melee/lb/lbsnap.c and lowers remaining unmatched surface to two functions

key_files.role: Header signature cleanup for lbSnap_8001E27C from placeholder UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void(void).
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/lb/lbsnap.h added 1 deleted 1 hunk 1
raw_diff: lbSnap_8001E27C changed from UNK_RET lbSnap_8001E27C(UNK_PARAMS) to void lbSnap_8001E27C(void)

what_changed.text: Added `static inline void lbSnap_ClearText(char* text)` and replaced repeated 0x21-byte text-zeroing loops in `lbSnap_8001D5FC`, `lbSnap_8001D7B0`, and `lbSnap_8001E058`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added lbSnap_ClearText
raw_diff: removed repeated while loops clearing text/text1/text2 and replaced with lbSnap_ClearText calls

what_changed.text: Reshaped card-result functions to cache `ptr->card_result` in `ret`, perform work only when `ret == 0`, assign call results into `ret`, and return once at the end.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_8001D5FC ret local and final return
raw_diff: lbSnap_8001D7B0 ret local and final return
raw_diff: lbSnap_8001E058 ret local and final return

what_changed.text: Added tiled-image offset helpers `lbSnap_GetTiledRGBOffset` and `lbSnap_GetTiledYOff`, then rewrote `lbSnap_8001DA5C` from register-named temporaries and large inline address expressions into named locals such as `dst`, `dst_x`, `src_x`, `dst_col`, `tile_column`, `dst_y`, `src_y_accum`, and `pixel`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added lbSnap_GetTiledRGBOffset and lbSnap_GetTiledYOff
raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DA5C removed r4/r5/r6/r7/r9/r10/r25/r27/r28 temporaries
raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DA5C now uses named loop locals and helper calls

what_changed.text: Cleaned `lbSnap_8001DC0C` time conversion by making `seconds` a `u32` and passing `OSSecondsToTicks((u64) seconds)` directly to `OSTicksToCalendarTime`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DC0C seconds changed from OSTime to u32
raw_diff: removed intermediate ticks assignment before OSTicksToCalendarTime

what_changed.text: Added `lbSnap_GetSaveDataOffset(struct Unk80433380_0* snap)` and reused it in `lbSnap_8001DF20` and `lbSnap_8001DF6C`, replacing duplicated pointer-difference expressions and comments noting uncertainty.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added lbSnap_GetSaveDataOffset
raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DF20 uses local snap and helper
raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DF6C uses desc pointer and helper

what_changed.text: Updated `src/melee/lb/lbsnap.h` so `lbSnap_8001E27C` has the concrete prototype `void lbSnap_8001E27C(void)` instead of placeholder `UNK_RET` and `UNK_PARAMS`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbsnap.h prototype change for lbSnap_8001E27C

what_changed.text: Reported verification was `python configure.py && ninja`; PR body claimed `main/melee/lb/lbsnap` reached 20/22 functions at 100%, with remaining blockers `lbSnap_8001DA5C` and `lbSnap_8001DF20`.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Verification and Remaining blockers sections

what_changed.text: Bot report listed 5 new matches in `main/melee/lb/lbsnap`: `lbSnap_8001DF6C`, `lbSnap_8001D7B0`, `lbSnap_8001D5FC`, `lbSnap_8001E058`, and `lbSnap_8001DC0C`; it also reported `lbSnap_8001DA5C` improved from 47.05% to 55.88%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: decomp-dev[bot] issue_comment report for GALE01

smart_moves.text: Factored repeated stack-buffer clearing into a small inline helper instead of keeping multiple near-identical loops in call sites.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_ClearText and replacements in lbSnap_8001D5FC/lbSnap_8001D7B0/lbSnap_8001E058

smart_moves.text: Converted register-placeholder locals in the image-copy/conversion loop into role-based names and helper expressions, making the RGB565-to-RGB5A3 tiled layout operation easier to review even though the function remained unmatched.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DA5C local rename and helper rewrite
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report says lbSnap_8001DA5C improved but remained unmatched

smart_moves.text: Pulled the duplicated save-data offset expression into a helper and reused a local pointer in `lbSnap_8001DF20`, reducing duplicated pointer arithmetic while preserving the known remaining register-allocation blocker noted in the PR body.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_GetSaveDataOffset and lbSnap_8001DF20 rewrite
human_pr_text: lbSnap_8001DF20 remaining blocker at 98.15790% register allocation only

smart_moves.text: Updated a header prototype when the function signature was apparently known, avoiding continued use of placeholder `UNK_RET` and `UNK_PARAMS` in `lbsnap.h`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbsnap.h lbSnap_8001E27C prototype change

decomp_lessons.lesson: When several related functions contain the same fixed-size local string clearing loop, a small file-local inline helper can express the repeated source intent and may help matching while improving readability.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added lbSnap_ClearText
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists lbSnap_8001D5FC/lbSnap_8001D7B0/lbSnap_8001E058 as new 100% matches

decomp_lessons.lesson: Replacing register-style temporary names with role-based locals and helper functions can make partially matched image/tile conversion code substantially more reviewable without claiming full match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DA5C rewrite from r-named locals to dst/src/tile/pixel locals
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report says lbSnap_8001DA5C improved from 47.05% to 55.88%

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a body or matching work supports a concrete signature, update the owning header rather than leaving placeholder `UNK_RET` or `UNK_PARAMS` declarations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_8001E27C prototype changed to void(void)

naming_conventions.text: New lbsnap-local helpers use the existing symbol prefix and Pascal-style suffixes: `lbSnap_ClearText`, `lbSnap_GetTiledRGBOffset`, `lbSnap_GetTiledYOff`, and `lbSnap_GetSaveDataOffset`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added static inline helper names

naming_conventions.text: Local variables in rewritten code use short role names rather than register names, including `ret`, `dst`, `dst_x`, `src_x`, `dst_col`, `tile_column`, `dst_y`, `src_y_accum`, `pixel`, `snap`, `desc`, and `chan_arg`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DA5C, lbSnap_8001DF20, lbSnap_8001DF6C local changes

naming_conventions.text: The PR preserves address-style global/function names such as `lbSnap_80433380`, `lbSnap_803BACC8`, and `lbSnap_8001DA5C` where fuller semantics are not shown in the evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: unchanged address-style global/function names in touched code

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used narrow inline helpers to abstract repeated expressions while keeping call sites likely inlineable for matching: text clearing, tiled RGB offsets, tiled Y offsets, and save-data offsets.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline helper additions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Retained `PAD_STACK(8)` in several functions and changed `lbSnap_8001DA5C` from `PAD_STACK(16)` to `PAD_STACK(8)`; removed `PAD_STACK(8)` from `lbSnap_8001DF6C` in the shown diff.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK changes in lbSnap_8001D5FC, lbSnap_8001D7B0, lbSnap_8001DA5C, lbSnap_8001DF6C, lbSnap_8001E058

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Cached `card_result` into a local `ret` and used single-exit return shapes in multiple card-operation functions, which coincided with bot-reported 100% matches for several of those functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ret reshaping in lbSnap_8001D5FC/lbSnap_8001D7B0/lbSnap_8001E058
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report new matches

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used an explicit cast to `u64` before `OSSecondsToTicks` after changing `seconds` to `u32` in `lbSnap_8001DC0C`; bot report indicates this function reached 100%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: OSSecondsToTicks((u64) seconds)
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists lbSnap_8001DC0C as 100.00%

accepted_candidate_records.title: Factor repeated fixed-size local string clearing into a local inline helper when evidence shows the same authored operation repeats
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2495, repeated 0x21-byte text-clearing loops in lbsnap card-operation functions were replaced with `lbSnap_ClearText`, and the bot report listed several affected functions as new 100% matches. Curator should treat this as a local lbsnap matching pattern, not a universal rule to replace every memset-like loop.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_ClearText
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report new matches

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use role-based locals and helper offset formulas to make tiled image conversion decomp more reviewable
accepted_candidate_records.text: In `lbSnap_8001DA5C`, the PR replaced register-style temporaries and duplicated pointer arithmetic with named locals and tiled offset helpers. The function remained unmatched, so the safe lesson is reviewability and partial-score improvement rather than full-match closure.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DA5C rewrite
text_corpus.jsonl: lbSnap_8001DA5C improved from 47.05% to 55.88%

source_update_candidates.title: Truthful header cleanup example: replace placeholder signatures when a concrete signature is recovered
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2495 provides an example for the existing truthful-headers standard: `src/melee/lb/lbsnap.h` changed `lbSnap_8001E27C` from `UNK_RET lbSnap_8001E27C(UNK_PARAMS)` to `void lbSnap_8001E27C(void)`. This can be cited as supporting evidence for updating owning headers when signatures are known.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbsnap.h prototype change
source_update_candidates.reason: The change aligns with the loaded `truthful-headers-and-includes` standard, but source-corpus promotion should be curator-reviewed.

source_update_candidates.title: Matching tactic ledger example: PAD_STACK changes should be tied to reported match results
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2495 retains, changes, and removes `PAD_STACK` in nearby lbsnap functions while reporting several new 100% matches and one partial improvement. This is useful as an example for the existing matching-tactics standard, but the slice does not include raw objdiff details for each PAD_STACK decision.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK edits
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report new matches and improvement
source_update_candidates.reason: Could enrich examples for `matching-tactics-need-evidence`; evidence is sufficient for an example candidate but not for a new universal rule.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that the PR was merged or accepted; metadata has state CLOSED and `merged_at` null.
Do not promote `lbSnap_GetTiledRGBOffset` or `lbSnap_GetTiledYOff` formulas as globally correct tiled image APIs; evidence only shows local lbsnap usage.
Do not claim `lbSnap_8001DA5C` or `lbSnap_8001DF20` were fully matched; PR body names them as remaining blockers and bot report only shows `lbSnap_8001DA5C` partial improvement.
Do not treat PAD_STACK usage in this diff as general style without per-function verifier evidence; the slice has a bot report but no detailed objdiff ledger.
